content.en:
Ye Tian was asking everywhere where he could find treasure resources that could help quickly improve the Eternal Dao Body.

Of course.

Many Eternal Dao Realm powerhouses will not tell you even if they knew.

Unless it's the kind of place where resources are not easily accessible and extremely dangerous, there is hope to find out.

this day.

Ye Tian inquired about such a place.

【Valley of Death】

This is a place located in the Death Zone.

There are almost no resources in the Death Zone, but nothing is absolute, and the Valley of Death is such a place, and there are still many resources in it that can help improve the Eternal Dao Body.

However, most of the resources in the Death Zone have great side effects and will amplify the problems of the Eternal Dao species.

Therefore, there are very few Eternal Dao realms who are willing to go to the valley of death.

And inside the Valley of Death, it is also quite dangerous, if you are not careful, you can easily die, or be transformed into a demon seed, and become a demon seed.

Therefore, very few Eternal Dao realms have entered the valley of death.

"The Valley of Death is perfect for me, so let's go to the Valley of Death!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

The Valley of Death is far away from the Ancient Cloud Realm.

The kingdom of the gods and dozens of nearby kingdoms are almost connected, and beyond this area is the Death Zone far beyond the area of these dozens of kingdoms, and far away, the Valley of Death.

Of course.

There is more to the Eternal Kingdom than this, but the other Eternal Kingdoms are too far away to interact with each other.

Ye Tian kept shuttling and crossing the death zone.

It was a long time before he came to the valley of death.

"It's really far away!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

A normal Eternal Dao Realm would not have traveled so far at all.

The Valley of Death looked like an ordinary valley from the outside, but as soon as Ye Tian entered, inside it was another world.

An endless gray mist filled the surroundings, as if to obscure everything from the outside world.

Ye Tian walked in the valley of death, looking for resources.

"The Valley of Death is not suitable for other Eternal Dao realms to enter here, the aura of death here is a bit strange, I'm afraid it will affect the Eternal Dao species." "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But the real threat to the Valley of Death is not this, but the Death Demon, the Death Evil Spirit absorbs the energy of the Death Zone and is born, similar to the threat of the Eternal Demon Spirit, once it is injured by the Death Demon, the Eternal Dao Seed will be endowed with a strange power, which will erode the Eternal Dao Seed from time to time, aggravating the problem of Demon Seeding.

Even if it can be cleared later, the problem of Eternal Dao Seed Demonization has intensified, and there is no way to reverse it!

Soon.

Ye Tian encountered a death demon, he killed it and quickly killed it, but he didn't see any dropped items.

"I thought I could come across a treasure similar to the Eternal Demon Crystal, but it turned out that there was nothing, then these Death Evil Spirit Stones are really useless!"

Ye Tian continued to move forward, gradually going deeper into the valley of death.

It took some time for him to finally find a black mushroom.

"It's an eternal black mushroom, which helps to improve the eternal Dao body, but it has a big impact on the eternal Dao species, and it will aggravate the demon seed, but it can't affect me, good thing!"

Ye Tian collected this Eternal Black Mushroom.

Then, he searched the neighborhood and soon found some more Eternal Black Mushrooms.

Of course, he also quickly encountered other death spirits, and after killing them for a long time, he was able to solve them.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to collect various resources in the Valley of Death, and occasionally encountered extremely terrifying death evil spirits, he was not an opponent, he could only be hunted down.

And in the deepest part of the Valley of Death, there is a death demon that is much more powerful than the Lord of Oko, and he will be killed in a short time if he encounters it now.

Ye Tian sent out one resource after another, and kept going in.

In this way, millions of solstice years passed.

"The resource collection in the Valley of Death is almost complete, and in the deepest place, my current strength can't enter. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he left the valley of death.

It will take a long time for new resources to be born here.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian used the resources of the Valley of Death to improve the Eternal Dao Body.

All kinds of resources were refined by Ye Tian, and the effect was really good at first, but as they got closer and closer to the Eternal Dao Body Xiaocheng, the effect was not very good.

He estimated that all these resources were exhausted, and at most he could only raise the Eternal Dao Body to the realm of Xiaocheng!

"The Eternal Dao Body is too difficult to improve, no wonder even the Eternal Dao Lord has opened up the Eternal Realm for countless years, and cultivated for such a long time, only to raise the Eternal Dao Body to the Dacheng realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Before you know it, 60 million years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally raised the Eternal Dao Body to the Xiaocheng realm.

Rumble!!!!!

His Eternal Dao Body began to transform, and his strength skyrocketed from moment to moment.

"The breakthrough is successful, the perfect level Eternal Dao body is Xiaocheng, my current strength is definitely not inferior to the original Auggu Country Lord, but I can open up the Eternal Realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

There are many benefits to opening up the eternal kingdom, and he naturally wants to open it up.

And.

After opening up the Eternal Realm, he can also send a group of human beings into his Eternal Realm, so that human beings can spread out and develop here.

Of course.

This group of humans, even if they are sent, cannot reveal the situation in the Void Domain, they must all make an oath, and only send geniuses over.

Other than that.

They can't be allowed to know the location of the Void, and once they enter here, they are not allowed to go back.

Otherwise, they will come and go at will, and the void will be exposed, and it will not be good.

In case he offends the strong, at least he has to hide in the Void Domain, and if the Void Domain is exposed, people can directly find his old nest.

"You can't open up a kingdom in the ancient kingdom, the void is there, and if you open it up there, it will still be easy to discover in the future. And now, the Void Domain is in the realm of death, and there is no strong person to go there, but it will be safer. "

So.

Ye Tian was ready to open up an eternal kingdom in other places.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian chose the vicinity of the Dragon Yan Realm to open up an eternal realm here, which was quite good.

This place is far away from the Demon Seed Abyss, and there are a total of six Demon Seed Abysses near the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, and this location is the best.

So on this day, Ye Tian came here and prepared to open up the eternal kingdom.
